subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! In truth thou art steadfast in the Covenant and a faithful servant at the Threshold of the Lord amidst countless afflictions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک جانا فی الحقیقه ثابت بر پیمانی و بنده باوفای آستان یزدان صدمات بیشمار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @the power of words; of speech, @praise and encouragement
